title: iris florentina var. illyrica
intro: Iris florentina var. illyrica, also known as the Dalmatian Iris, is a perennial plant that belongs to the iris family and is native to the Dalmatian region of Croatia. The medicinal properties of Iris florentina var. illyrica lie in its root, which has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues and inflammation. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe coughs, relieve congestion, and act as an anti-inflammatory agent. The herbal preparations of Iris florentina var. illyrica include infusions, tinctures, and dried roots, which can be used to create teas, syrups, and other remedies.
